sanskrit:
तमेव शरणं गच्छ सर्वभावेन भारत।
तत्प्रसादात्परां शान्तिं स्थानं प्राप्स्यसि शाश्वतम्॥
transliteration:
tam eva śaraṇaṃ gaccha sarva-bhāvena bhārata
 tat-prasādāt parāṃ śāntiṃ sthānaṃ prāpsyasi śāśvatam
literal_meaning: To Him alone go for refuge, with your whole being, O Bharata; by His grace you will attain supreme peace and the eternal abode.
contextual_meaning: Total surrender of the ego to an inner transcendent center dissolves chronic anxiety and delivers a lasting felt-safety.
psychological_state: Post-decisional relaxation after egoic control is relinquished; secure attachment to an internalized benevolent presence.
trigger_scenario: The moment you hand over the car keys when you’re too exhausted to drive and finally let someone you trust take the wheel.
anchor_text: Let go completely and trust the quiet presence within.
